subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and distinguished one! The effect of thy musk-scented pen possessed the sweetness of honey and nectar, and thus did the spiritual taste prove sweet indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت اثر خامه مشکین حلاوت شهد و انگبین داشت لهذا مذاق روحانی شیرین
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
